description: Initial screen state showing the Askable session page with instructions to share the screen.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: Browser window open to an Askable session page. A message on a dark background instructs the user to share their screen.

description: The task instructions are automatically typed out on the screen, detailing the scenario of booking a return domestic flight in Australia using Flight Centre.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The screen displays the full task description for the user testing session.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button to start the task.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Open' button at the bottom of the instruction screen.

description: A 'Pop-up blocked' notification icon appears in the browser address bar.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The browser address bar shows a small icon indicating a pop-up was blocked.

description: User clicks the 'Pop-up blocked' icon in the address bar.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The user interacts with the browser's pop-up blocker notification.

description: A pop-up settings menu appears below the address bar.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: A browser menu is visible with options to allow or continue blocking pop-ups.

description: User selects 'Always allow pop-ups and redirects from https://sessions.askable.com'.
interaction_target: Always allow pop-ups and redirects from https://sessions.askable.com
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The user chooses the option to permit pop-ups for the session site.

description: User clicks the 'Done' button in the pop-up settings menu.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The user confirms the browser settings change.

description: Navigation to the Flight Centre homepage in a new tab.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: A new browser tab opens and loads the Flight Centre website.

description: Flight Centre homepage is fully loaded.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The Flight Centre homepage is visible with a search widget and promotional banners.

description: Page content begins to load, showing skeleton screens for the search bar and banners.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays, Cruises & More
frame_description: Flight Centre homepage with skeleton loading states visible.

description: User scrolls down the Flight Centre homepage.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The page content moves upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: User hovers over the flight search widget.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the flight search form on the Flight Centre homepage.

description: User clicks on the flight search widget.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The user interacts with the flight search form.

description: A 'Travel dates' date picker modal appears.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: A date picker modal overlay appears on the screen, showing calendars for February and March 2026.

description: User hovers over the close button (X) of the promotional popup.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the close button in the top right corner of the promotional popup.

description: User clicks the 'x' button to close the loyalty program advertisement.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the close button of the ad overlay.

description: The advertisement overlay is dismissed, revealing the calendar again.
frame_description: The 'Travel dates' calendar is visible again after the ad is closed.

description: User selects February 18th as the departure date.
frame_description: The date '18' in February 2026 is selected and highlighted.

description: User selects February 21st as the return date.
frame_description: The date '21' in February 2026 is selected, completing the date range.

description: User clicks the 'Done' button to confirm travel dates.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the blue 'Done' button at the bottom right of the modal.

description: The travel dates modal closes.
frame_description: The homepage search bar is visible again with the selected dates populated.

description: User clicks on the 'Where to?' destination input field.
frame_description: The cursor is inside the destination search box.

description: A dropdown menu with destination suggestions appears.
frame_description: A list of popular cities like Sydney, Melbourne, and Brisbane is shown in a dropdown.

description: User hovers over 'Melbourne, Australia' in the destination dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor is hovering over the Melbourne option in the list.

description: User selects 'Melbourne, Australia' from the dropdown.
frame_description: The Melbourne option is clicked and the dropdown begins to close.

description: The destination dropdown menu closes.
frame_description: The search bar now shows 'Melbourne, Australia' in the destination field.

description: User clicks the 'Search flights' button.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the large blue 'Search flights' button.

description: Navigation to the flight search results page begins.
frame_description: The page begins to transition to the results view.

description: The search results loading screen is displayed.
frame_description: A loading screen with the text 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' is visible.

description: Loading spinner appears while flight results are being fetched.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Results
frame_description: A loading spinner is visible in the center of the screen with the text 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' and 'Our clever robots are fetching the latest deals across every airline...' below it.

description: User scrolls down the page to view more flight results.
frame_description: The page content moves upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: Flight results load and are displayed on the page.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Results
frame_description: The loading spinner is gone, and a list of departing flights from Sydney to Melbourne is now visible.

description: User clicks on the price button to select the departing flight.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Results
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'FROM $307' button for the first flight in the list.

description: Fare type options expand for the selected flight.
frame_description: The section for the selected flight expands downwards, revealing two fare type cards: 'Red Edeal' and 'Economy Flex'.

description: User selects the 'Red Edeal' fare type.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Results
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'SELECT' button for the 'Red Edeal' fare type.

description: Loading spinner appears before showing return flight options.
frame_description: A loading spinner with the text 'Good choice!' and 'It's time to choose your flight for your return journey...' is visible.

description: Return flight results load and are displayed.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Results
frame_description: The loading spinner is gone, and a list of return flights from Melbourne to Sydney is now visible.

description: User scrolls down to view more return flight options.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The user is on the flight search results page, scrolling through the 'Select Return Flight' section.

description: Cursor lingers over the first Virgin Australia flight option.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the first flight result row.

description: User clicks to select the 6:00am Virgin Australia flight.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The user clicks the flight row, and the row highlights.

description: Fare type selection panel expands for the selected flight.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: Three fare options (Lite, Choice, Flex) appear below the selected flight row.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the Lite fare.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The cursor is over the blue 'SELECT' button for the $157 fare.

description: 'All Set!' loading overlay appears.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: A white loading overlay covers the search results.

description: Page transitions from flight selection to trip review.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The loading overlay disappears, revealing the 'Review trip' page.

description: 'Review trip' content finishes loading.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The flight details for both legs of the trip are visible on the review page.

description: Price summary sidebar appears on the right.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: The right sidebar populates with the price summary details.

description: User scrolls down the page to view the 'Add-ons' section.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Review trip
frame_description: The user is on the 'Review trip' page, scrolling down past the flight details to the 'Add-ons' section.

description: User scrolls down to the 'Seats' section.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Review trip
frame_description: The user scrolls further down the page, passing 'Baggage' and 'Add Lost Baggage Tracking & Recovery' to reach the 'Seats' section.

description: User clicks on the 'SELECT SEATS' button.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Review trip
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'SELECT SEATS' button in the 'Seats' section of the page.

description: A 'Select Seats' modal appears with a 'Loading seat selector' message and spinner.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Review trip
frame_description: A modal window titled 'Select Seats' is displayed over the main page content, showing a loading spinner.

description: The seat map for the flights is displayed in the modal.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Review trip
frame_description: The 'Select Seats' modal now displays a graphical seat map of the aircraft.

description: User hovers over seat 5E on the seat map.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Review trip
frame_description: The cursor is hovering over seat 5E in the seat map within the modal.

description: User clicks on seat 5E.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Review trip
frame_description: The user selects seat 5E by clicking on it in the seat map.

description: User scrolls the seat map within the modal.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Review trip
frame_description: The seat map content within the modal moves vertically as the user scrolls.

description: User performs a slight scroll of the seat map.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Review trip
frame_description: The seat map shifts slightly just before the seat confirmation popup appears.

description: A confirmation popup appears for the selected seat 5E, showing the price.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Review trip
frame_description: A small white popup is visible next to seat 5E with the text 'Preferred Seat $28.00 pp' and a 'CONFIRM SEAT' button.

description: User hovers over the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Review trip
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button in the small popup.

description: User clicks the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Review trip
frame_description: The user clicks the blue 'CONFIRM SEAT' button in the popup.

description: The seat selection modal closes.
frame_description: The seat selection modal has disappeared, showing the full seat map again.

description: User clicks the 'DONE' button at the bottom of the modal.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Review trip
frame_description: The user clicks the 'DONE' button, triggering the modal to close.

description: The seat selection modal closes and a loading spinner appears on the main page.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Review trip
frame_description: The modal disappears, and the main page content is visible with a loading spinner over the 'Seats' section.

description: User scrolls down the page.
frame_description: The page content is moving upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'SELECT' button for the Captain's Pack.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the 'SELECT' button in the Online Captain's Pack section.

description: User clicks the "CONTINUE" button.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The cursor is over the green 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom of the page.

description: Loading overlay appears with a spinner.
frame_description: A full-screen loading overlay is visible with a progress spinner and confirmation text.

description: Navigation to the passenger details page.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The passenger details page has loaded, showing form fields for traveler information.

description: User scrolls down on the passenger details page.
frame_description: The passenger details form is scrolling into view.

description: User scrolls down on the passenger details page.
frame_description: The user is scrolling further down the traveler details form.

description: User scrolls down on the passenger details page.
frame_description: The page content moves as the user performs a final scroll in this segment.
